method: Google Maps Reviews tab sorted by Highest rating via Sort -> Highest rating; extracted visible written reviews after scrolling.

reviews.text: Whether you’re starting off your evening or looking for a place to “wine down”, all roads lead to Winestock. Friendly atmosphere, eclectic patrons and always phenomenal live music! Don’t miss out on their great full bottle pricing, Chicago style beefs and hotdogs, and high end cheese charcuterie boards! Service and dress is casual and warm! Amazing staff to boot! Love this awesome addition to the historic Woodstock Square!

What a fantastic shop! I was planning a party with a wine pairing and needed some help. I mentioned it to Carolyn and she said she would love to help. I came back a few days later and she had several selections based on the menu I sent over. Exceptional service all around! Thanks Winestock!!!
Fun little place! Great selection of wines and very affordable. Live music on the weekends and nice outside space when it's nice out. Very friendly staff.

THE go-to place in Woodstock. Especially Fridays and Saturdays when owner Mike Levitan arranges a variety of live music gigs inside or out, rain or shine.  Solid selection of wines, beers ‘n spirits too.  The people that frequent this place have enriched my life.  I’m grateful for this gem of a place my wife and I get to visit whenever!

We absolutely loved the atmosphere, snacks, and vino! The staff was incredibly friendly and accommodating. I believe the owner was also there and he was so kind and informative. We stopped in with our kids after the farmers market. Great place!
Great ambience and a wonderful, eclectic selection of wines you can't find at the chain stores.

This place is adorable! We were drawn in after eating dinner nearby by the beautiful sounds of a jazz band. My husband and I didn't want to go inside since they were about to close, but the bartender and some happy patrons encouraged us to go in! We had a delicious and incredibly reasonable bottle of wine and listened to some amazing music. We keep checking their Facebook to see when live music will happen next! 10/10 recommended to our friends!
Great place with a casual vibe. Laid back & cool owner. Great wines & yummy charcuterie board. Very welcoming & clearly a local favorite based on the many familiar patrons who came through.

Winestock I spoke of  before  and it has only gotten better. A more mature epicurian bar with food. Fine-fine selection of craft beer and well selected wines. Livingroom decor with natural cabin wood tables.
Intimate atmosphere. Entertainment on weekends once a month.  Those of you who follow my recommendations  will be very satisfied and happy with your companions reaction.

Mike always does a great job of making everyone feel welcome and the wine tasting brought in some very interesting choices this Friday.  Nice group of people in attendance. All should try it at least once.

This is the wine cafe you've been looking for. Huge selection of wines and other alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks. Plus great service by Kylie! Went there for a friend's birthday party. Had a fun time there!
Always fresh Chicago style dogs and some wholesome music to be had.  Jalapeño margaritas were warm and nice as well.

Winestock, a.k.a. Woodstock’s living room, is the best place to have a good evening with friends, wine and charcuterie in town.  We’ve met a whole slew of great locals, and always have an excellent time. Love it.
Lovely little space to relax with friends or date night.  Local musicians give it a special feel. Nice selection of international & local wines.
Had a wonderful experience at Winestock and the staff there is world class. The business is a gift to the Woodstock Square and highly recommend if you've never been there before.
My partner and i had a beautiful time. We enjoyed the wide selection of wines and liked the pricing with most selections under $20
Great wine, great music, great atmosphere. Need more seating, definitely plan on going back.

A very friendly place in Woodstock.

Try the wines, paired with charcuterie boards.  You can't go wrong!
Great atmosphere, excellent entertainment, wide wine selection
Fantastic place to chill and sip wine or craft beer, nice cheese plates too
Very gregarious and knowledgeable owner, Mike. Interesting and sophisticated conversationalist as well.
Great beer selection and entertainment! Reasonable prices.
Best Italian beef around, great wine selection, and wonderful hosts!
Always fun to try new wines and have chance to visit with friends
Authentic wine bistro. Excellent service wonderful atmosphere
It's an awesomely relaxing place to hang out!
Great Little Spot also live music..
A must visit when looking for Woodstock Willy 😜 the groundhog.
Fun and great service!
I loved the ambiance
